sql_array: CREATE USER "TestUser" WITH UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'password123' NAME 'Test User' SCHEMA "test_schema";
CREATE USER "AnotherUser" WITH ENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'securePass' NAME 'Another User' MAX_MEMORY 1000000 OPTIMIZER default DEFAULT ROLE "user_role";
INSERT INTO sys.users (login_name, password, full_name) VALUES ('FuzzUser', 'fuzzPassword', 'Fuzz User') RETURNING *;
UPDATE sys.users SET max_memory = 2000000 WHERE login_name = 'TestUser';
SELECT * FROM sys.users WHERE login_name LIKE 'Test%';
